content: Supabase anti-pause via GitHub Actions: Supabase free tier pauses projects after ~7 days inactivity; permanently deletes after 90 days paused. Best approach: hit /auth/v1/health endpoint with anon key (no service_role key needed, endpoint is public by design). Schedule: every 3-4 days (not daily — avoid rate-limit appearance). GitHub Actions YAML: schedule cron + curl to https://YOUR_PROJECT.supabase.co/auth/v1/health with headers apikey: SUPABASE_ANON_KEY. Store SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_ANON_KEY as GitHub Secrets. Alternative: SELECT 1 via supabase-js, but /auth/v1/health is simpler and safer.
